name: Wijdemeren (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal logo (lily pads) and the name 'gemeente Wijdemeren'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Wijdemeren in the province of North Holland, formed in 2002. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal logo (lily pads) and wordmark 'gemeente Wijdemeren'
